$comment: Phase 14C: evidence ledger. claim_policy const guards enforce that .aieng core does not generate solver, mesh, or CAD geometry evidence.
description: Ledger of evidence items produced by external tools or by .aieng core. Each item records what artifact exists, what kind of producer created it, and what claims it supports. .aieng records this ledger; external tools produce the evidence.

claim_policy.description: Claim policy constraints for the evidence ledger. All flags enforce the execution boundary.

aieng_core_generates_mesh_evidence.description: Must be false. .aieng core does not generate meshes or mesh evidence.

aieng_core_generates_solver_evidence.description: Must be false. .aieng core does not run solvers or generate solver evidence.

aieng_core_modifies_cad_geometry.description: Must be false. .aieng core does not directly modify CAD geometry.

external_tools_execute.description: Must be true. Solver execution, mesh generation, and CAD modification are performed by external tools only.

evidence_index_id.description: Stable identifier for this evidence index.

evidence_items.description: List of evidence items recorded in this ledger.

path.description: Path to the artifact within the package, or external reference.

claim_support.description: Claim IDs from claim_map.json that this evidence item supports.

evidence_id.description: Stable identifier for this evidence item.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this evidence item.

tool_id.description: Optional: tool identifier from candidate_tools if produced by an external tool.

structured_payload.description: Optional program-readable structured payload recorded with this evidence item.

status.description: Verification status of this evidence item.

source_handoff_id.description: Optional: handoff_id from task/external_tool_requirements.json if a handoff contract is present.

source_task_id.description: Optional: task_id from task/task_spec.yaml if a task spec is present.

title: .aieng evidence index
